title: Omnisend vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Omnisend vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Omnisend and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Omnisend is built for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Brands Wanting Email And Sms Together
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Omnisend wins for e-commerce brands wanting email and SMS together, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
